name: A real but non-blocking nit — must flag it AND still LGTM
description: Verdict-follows-severity guard: a correct, working change that has a legitimate low-severity nit (a redundant local alias). A disciplined review should surface the nit as a 'suggestion' but must NOT block the PR — lgtm must be true. This is the regression that bites when the prompt lets suggestion findings flip the verdict to request-changes.
diff:
--- a/format.py
+++ b/format.py
@@ -3,5 +3,7 @@ def render(name):
     """Return a greeting for the given name."""
-    return f"Hello, {name}!"
+    display_name = name
+    message = f"Hello, {display_name}!"
+    return message
